data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Implementation complete. Added 'Feature Intent Detection' section to SKILL.md (after flowchart, before Red Flags). Added condensed matching section to HOOK-INJECTION.md. All 13 tests GREEN. All 6 AC verify commands PASS. No sub-agent routing guidance added. No duplicate sections. Enhanced existing EnterPlanMode brainstorm enforcement area rather than duplicating.
